project_description: Identity management system migration from Microsoft AD + LDAP to Azure AD B2C + Entra ID. 80k users, account migration, attribute synchronization, MFA, SSPR, Conditional Access Policies configuration, updating 40 applications to OAuth2/OIDC (from LDAP bind), helpdesk training.
client_history: Client has 40 applications with LDAP auth — each requires separate work.
risk_patterns: Applications with LDAP bind: many legacy apps don't support OAuth2 — adapter or refactoring.
pm_comment: 8 applications required deep auth refactoring — no simple adapter possible.
